languages.text: {n}Странное ощущение наполняет ваш разум беспокойством. Словно где-то на вашем пустотном корабле появилось что-то инородное и злокозненное. Появилось... и пропало, забрав с собой нечто, принадлежавшее вам. Шестое чувство шепчет вам, что причину вашего смятения надо будет искать в собственных покоях.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Странное ощущение наполняет ваш разум беспокойством. Словно где-то на вашем пустотном корабле появилось что-то инородное и злокозненное. Появилось... и пропало, забрав с собой нечто, принадлежавшее вам. Шестое чувство шепчет вам, что причину вашего смятения надо будет искать в собственных покоях.{/n}

languages.text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Странное ощущение наполняет ваш разум беспокойством. Словно где-то на вашем пустотном корабле появилось что-то инородное и злокозненное. Появилось... и пропало, забрав с собой нечто, принадлежавшее вам. Шестое чувство шепчет вам, что причину вашего смятения надо будет искать в собственных покоях.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless. As if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away a piece of what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

{n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless. As if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away a piece of what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

{n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

{n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一种异样的感觉令你心神不宁，仿佛有什么污秽而异质的东西爬上了你的虚空舰，又悄无声息地离去，带走了本属于你的东西。直觉告诉你，这个谜题的答案，正在你的私人舱室中等着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一种异样的感觉令你心神不宁，仿佛有什么污秽而异质的东西爬上了你的虚空舰，又悄无声息地离去，带走了本属于你的东西。直觉告诉你，这个谜题的答案，正在你的私人舱室中等着你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una incómoda sensación perturba tu mente, como si algo repulsivo y desconocido se hubiese infiltrado en tu nave del vacío para luego escabullirse con algo que te pertenece. Tu intuición te dice que la respuesta a este misterio te aguarda en tus aposentos privados.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una incómoda sensación perturba tu mente, como si algo repulsivo y desconocido se hubiese infiltrado en tu nave del vacío para luego escabullirse con algo que te pertenece. Tu intuición te dice que la respuesta a este misterio te aguarda en tus aposentos privados.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous êtes soudain en proie à l'inquiétude, comme si une entité infâme et étrangère s'était infiltrée à bord de votre vaisseau avant de disparaître avec ce qui vous appartenait. À en croire votre intuition, la réponse à ce mystère vous attend dans vos quartiers privés.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous êtes soudain en proie à l'inquiétude, comme si une entité infâme et étrangère s'était infiltrée à bord de votre vaisseau avant de disparaître avec ce qui vous appartenait. À en croire votre intuition, la réponse à ce mystère vous attend dans vos quartiers privés.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein unheimliches Gefühl beschleicht deinen Verstand, als wäre etwas Übles und Außerirdisches in dein Raumschiff gekrochen und dann wieder verschwunden ... nachdem es dich bestohlen hat. Deine Intuition sagt dir, dass du die Lösung dieses Mysteriums in deinen Privatgemächern finden wirst.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

Deine Intuition sagt dir, dass du die Lösung dieses Mysteriums in deinen Privatgemächern finden wirst.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ürkütücü bir his, zihnini huzursuz bırakıyor. Sanki iğrenç ve yabancı bir şey; uçsuz gemisine sızmış, ardından ortadan kaybolmuş. Sana ait olanı da alıp götürmüş. Sezgilerin, bu gizemin cevabının özel odanda seni beklediğini söylüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}不気味な感覚が心を落ち着かせない。何か不吉で異質なものが自分の空飛ぶ船に乗り込み、消えていった。そして、自分のものだったものを奪っていった。この謎の答えは、自分の個室に待っているのだと直感する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An eerie feeling leaves your mind restless, as if something foul and alien crept onto your voidship, only to disappear — carrying away what was yours. Your intuition tells you that the answer to this mystery awaits in your private chambers.{/n}
